issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios, such as authentication failures or network errors.
The skill is specific to the OpenAI SDK and may not work with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Build cited research assistant for current AI regulation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses OpenAI SDK with base_url=https://api.perplexity.ai, sonar-pro model, and reads response.citations URLs; baseline calls Perplexity HTTP REST without the OpenAI-compatible pattern and omits citation extraction.

scenarios.name: Stream Bitcoin price answer with source URLs
scenarios.rationale: Treatment streams via OpenAI SDK with stream=True and prints chunk.choices[0].delta.content, then reads response.citations; baseline mostly suggests a generic requests-based streaming pattern that misses the citations field.
